PEP: 3000
Title: Python 3000
Author: Guido van Rossum
Status: Final
Type: Process
Created: 05-Apr-2006
Resolution: See Python 3.0 release announcements

Abstract
========

This PEP describes the changes that would go into Python 3000 (Python
3.0).

Motivation
==========

Python 2 assumes backwards compatibility with early 2000s tooling.
The Python 3 plan depends on a coordinated migration story across
the ecosystem.
